title: Legacy Reference Registry
description: Registry of legacy references and patterns that are retained for compatibility, migration, or historical purposes. Each entry documents why a legacy reference exists, what it serves, and when it may be removed.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this registry was generated

entries.description: Legacy reference entries documenting retained patterns and their lifecycle

path.description: Repository path where the legacy reference exists

pattern.description: Exact pattern or AST selector identifying the legacy reference

classification.description: Classification of the legacy reference's purpose and lifecycle

subsystem.description: Owning subsystem responsible for this legacy reference

reason.description: Explanation of why this reference is retained

permanent.description: Whether this legacy reference is permanent (never to be removed)

compatibilityContract.description: What compatibility contract this reference serves

removalGate.description: Condition under which this reference may be removed, e.g. 'before public alpha', 'after migration reader ships for 2 releases'

replacementIdentity.description: What replaces this legacy reference once removed

validatingTest.description: Path to the test that validates this reference's continued correctness
